title: × orchicoeloglossum mixtum
intro: × Orchicoeloglossum mixtum is a rare, hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross between Orchis mascula and Coeloglossum viride. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of × Orchicoeloglossum mixtum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea or tincture form, with the dried roots and leaves being steeped in hot water to create a medicinal infusion.
